data: Director Office of Manufacturing and Energy Supply Chains
Director Office of Manufacturing and Energy Supply Chains, Department of Energy
Jervis Geoffrey G - Political Appointees (excludes PAS) - Termination  - 278 - 2025 - 2025-06-18
Jervis Geoffrey G - General 278s - New Entrant  - 278 - 2025 - 2025-04-16
Mint Eco Car Wash Holdings, LLC

I am resigning as CEO effective 3/1/25 (before I am scheduled to start at DOE).  I will receive "severance" for past services in a series of payments through the end of 2025.  None of these payments will be for services after 3/1/25.
Mint Eco Car Wash Portfolio Co, LLC
This is a wholly owned subsidiary of Mint Eco Car Wash Holdings, LLC.  My resignation from Mint Eco Car Wash Holdings also applies to this entity.
Mint Eco Car Wash Acquisitions Co, LLC
Mint Eco Car Wash Construction Co, LLC
Mint Eco Car Wash, LLC (Car Wash Operations, Development, Ownership)
This Partnership also generated losses during the applicable period.  The amount shown is only the Guaranteed Payments received (a proxy for salary and benefits).
Mint Eco Car Wash, LLC, anticipated severance
Severance.  10 equal monthly payments of roughly $25,000
BX Partnership #1 -- The BSSF -- Related Segregated Trust (value not readily ascertainable)

Interests in Blackstone sponsored entities.  I invested in several Blackstone funds when I was employee. These investments are old and have unascertainable value and little to no income.  For income, I used 2023 reported income as a proxy for 2024.  The numbers on this form are 2023 income multiplied by 2.

Palm Beach Atlantic Retirement, 403(B)(7) Plan, no remaining assets

I will resign as CEO and from all positions at all subsidiaries effective 3/1/25.  Thereafter, I will have no paying role in the organization.  I will receive severance for past services through the end of 2025.I will also remain on the Board of Directors indefinitely (non-paying position). (2025-03-01)
Matrix Trust Company (Palm Beach University 403(B)(7) Plan)
I no longer participate in this defined contribution plan. It was closed in 2023 and rolled into the IRA. (2025-01-01)
Broadcom Inc. 8.00% Mandatory Convertible Preferred Stock Series A (AVGOP)
Royal Dutch Shell PLC American Depositary Shares (each representing two (2) Ordinary Shares)  (SHEL)
Ryan Specialty Holdings Inc. Class A Common Stock (RYAN)
Vertiv Holdings LLC Class A Common Stock (VRT)

Spouse is owner of ~9% of a corporation with ~$200MM of real estate holdings.  The assets are (1) residential real estate in Palm Beach, FL, and (2) commercial real estate (vacant land being sold for development) in Warner Robbins, Houston County, GA.
Residential Real Estate (Palm Beach, FL) value not readily ascertainable
Commercial real estate, Warner Robbins, GA (value not readily ascertainable)

Spouse will ultimately be a ~1/3 beneficiary of a trust of which her mother is currently the only beneficiary. Trust assets are (1) Cash, (2) Old Westbury Large Cap Strategies Fund, (3) Old Westbury Small Cap and Mid Cap Strategies Fund, (4) Old Westbury Core Fund, and (5) Bessemer Securities LLC (via a family holding company).
Voluntary taxable income payout at the Trustee's discretion.
Old Westbury Large Cap Strategies Fund (OWLSX)
Old Westbury Small & Mid Cap Strategies Fund (OWSMX)
Old Westbury All Cap Core Fund (OWACX)
Bessemer Securities LLC (via a family holding company)

Spouse is currently sole beneficiary of this Trust.  Spouse has no claims to receive principal from this trust, only income.  Upon Spouse's death, Trust reverts to her descendants (in further trust) of which she has none.  In that case, Trust reverts to her two siblings (in further trust).  The Trust has three assets (1) shares of Bessemer Securities, LLC, a privately held corporation.  Bessemer is a financial services company. Estimated value $900,000. (2) a municipal bond fund.  Estimated value $8,000. (3) Cash.  Estimated value $13,000.
2023 income $12K 2024 income not available.  Trust owns 2% of RE partnership investment - do not have FMV of investment
Filer is only a 25% beneficiary of the Trust
John Hancock Life Insurance Company, Universal
Trust for dependent children. Their beneficiary interest totals 30% of the assets.
